calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Contreras/Ron Ross, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Mark Henderson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Conard House.
Attorney, John P. Zanghi, representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Renae Finley is present.
Attorney, Theresa Lynn Friend, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of 11-03-08 is vacated.
